rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"When reorganizing roles (e.g., moving them to a new module), update all backward-compat re-export files too — it's easy to forget them.","scope":"src/server/payload/collections/Users/roles.ts"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Backend-integration layers that import roles from shared infra need their import paths updated when roles are reorganized.","scope":"src/server/payload/backend-integration"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Always confirm the implementation branch is up to date with origin before reviewing, to avoid flagging issues that were already fixed.","scope":"code-review workflow"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Quality gates (typecheck + lint + unit tests) must all pass before a PR review is marked verified.","scope":"PR review workflow"}]}
